title: Britain’s only female naval commando among victims of Devon helicopter crash
description: Lt Lily-Mae Fisher, Lt Cmdr Chris Grayson and Petty Officer Owen Green died during Royal Navy training exercise
content:
Britain’s only serving female naval commando has been named as one of the three people who died in a helicopter crash during a military training exercise in Devon on Wednesday.
The victims have been named by the Ministry of Defence as Lt Lily-Mae Fis... [3328 chars]

title: Tube strike usage higher than Tuesday, TfL says
description: Members of the Rail, Maritime and Transport Union walked out on Thursday for a second day of strike action.
content:
Journeys across London using public transport on Thursday during the latest day of strike action by drivers were at 86% of their usual levels, according to Transport for London (TfL).

title: England vs New Zealand: Ollie Robinson makes stunning return at Lord's
description: Ollie Robinson takes three wickets in his first over for England in more than two years to breathe life into their post-Ashes rebuild on day one of the first Test against New Zealand.
content:
Ollie Robinson took three wickets in his first over for England in more than two years to breathe life into their post-Ashes rebuild on day one of the first Test against New Zealand.

title: Two brothers jailed for killing 16-year-old boy with car in Sheffield
description: Zulkernain Ahmed was in pursuit of a group on bikes when he hit Abdullah Yaser Abdullah Taleb, who was walking on pavement
content:
Two brothers have been jailed for killing a 16-year-old boy who was “in the wrong place at the wrong time” when he was hit while walking by a car being deliberately driven at a group on bikes.

title: Ex-wife of Dubai ruler's nephew missing, says lawyer
description: British lawyer David Haigh lost contact with Zeynab Javadli on Tuesday and the BBC has been told her home in Dubai is locked and empty.
content:
A British human rights lawyer says the former wife of a nephew of the ruler of Dubai has gone missing.
Contact with Zeynab Javadli was lost on Tuesday and the BBC has been told her home in Dubai is locked and empty.
